result.summary: Found a few layout issues where content is being clipped or obscured, most notably at the bottom navigation area and on the right edge of the game grids. There are also some truncated tab labels indicating horizontal overflow on smaller screens.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar is covering the lower portion of the game grid, with the last row of cards partially hidden behind it.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the main content so it clears the fixed footer navigation, or make the footer non-overlapping.

issues.description: The rightmost game cards in the grids are cut off at the screen edge, leaving only a partial view of the third column.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid layout, card widths, or horizontal padding so cards fit within the viewport without clipping, especially on mobile widths.

issues.description: The top category tab text is truncated on the right side (for example, 'Hot Ga...'), making the label look unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Allow the tab row to scroll cleanly, widen the tab, or shorten the label so the full text is visible.
